content:
Save
A student may “protect” another by taking on their challenge instead.
If the saving student fails, they take double the penalty.


✅ Why This Works:
• Creates a competitive but engaging atmosphere.
• Encourages students to pay attention to details.
• Ties literature into social strategy & risk assessment.

📌 Final Lock-In Questions for Version 5.5

1. Should students be allowed only one “reroll” per semester, or should rerolls be limited per unit?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 190 (chunk 190/555)
